A. 2025 MCAHPS Analytic Data Contents 8 

name LABEL FORMAT 

md_leavansr RECODE : How often leave doctor office feeling all concerns were fully answered OFA 
md_result RECODE : How often did you make sure you understood the results of medical tests OFA 
pl_getcare RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often easy to get needed care/tests/treatment OFA 
pl_paperwk RECODE : Last 6 mths, health plan give forms to fill out YNA 
pl_ezpaper RECODE : Last 6 mths, how often health plan forms easy to fill out OFA
